## Notes

- GGUF works with llama.cpp and mistralrs backends.
- SafeTensors is the preferred HuggingFace format for mistralrs/candle.
- Legacy GGML/GGJT can be converted to GGUF for best compatibility.
- PyTorch .bin, .pt, .pth, .ckpt should be converted to SafeTensors or GGUF before use.
